character_designs.identity: 17-year-old Canyang Ao hunter, guide, and descendant of old relay-road surveyors

body_and_face.age_lock: Clearly 17, with youth in jawline and eyes; not a mature hard-edged warlord.
body_and_face.build: Lean, wiry, long-term hunter strength rather than armored bulk.
body_and_face.posture: Slight left-shoulder asymmetry from old injury and long-term archery.
body_and_face.expression: Guarded, quiet, observant; eyes read wind, ground, and exits before people.

constant_anchors: plain unmarked pouch hiding the half Sun-Moon relay token
abstract gold-red dark thread and residue that never forms an emblem
dormant-to-activated gold-red crack behavior during short old-relay or martial-vein trigger

state_designs.silhouette: Short practical hunter layers, clean but worn, agile and village-rooted.
state_designs.color_logic: Canyang Ao grey-brown and herb green dominate; old leather brown grounds the equipment; gold-red appears only as faint abstract seam or eye-corner residue, never as an insignia.
state_designs.damage_level: Minor wear, no fire damage yet.
required_details: bow visible
short knife accessible
water bag and cord practical
left shoulder sits slightly guarded

state_designs.silhouette: Same hunter structure, slightly tightened for running and hiding.
materials: repair stitches at shoulder and elbow
state_designs.color_logic: Grey-brown and herb green become smoke-dulled; soot black, fire-dark red, and tiny gold-red ember thread remain focal marks.
state_designs.damage_level: Visible but controlled fire aftermath; never shredded or muddy all over.
required_details: charred hem remains the focal continuity anchor
clothes stay complete and fitted
route pouch looks lighter than village state
no heroic badge, old-empire insignia, or full crest

state_designs.silhouette: Hunter structure under border survival overlay, not military armor.
state_designs.color_logic: Snowline greys overlay the core grey-brown and herb green; charred hem and very small gold-red residue can still show at the lower edge.
required_details: cloak must not hide the hunter identity completely
no officer armor
no grey-wall official badge
bow remains practical rather than ceremonial

detail_panels.purpose: Keep face as a guarded 17-year-old youth.
detail_panels.notes: Black hair, clear wary eyes, not a beard, not adult kingly severity.

detail_panels.purpose: Show old injury and hunter craft.
detail_panels.notes: Slight asymmetry, old leather guard, reinforced shoulder cloth.

detail_panels.purpose: Make guide/hunter function readable.
detail_panels.notes: Trap cord, route pouch, small water bag, short knife sheath.

detail_panels.purpose: Lock ranged-hunter silhouette.
detail_panels.notes: Bow and quiver hang-points visible without heroic display.

detail_panels.purpose: Carry post-episode-02 continuity.
detail_panels.notes: Localized soot and stitching, not ragged costume destruction.

detail_panels.purpose: Carry old relay-road identity as hidden contraband without redesigning or displaying a Zhaoming badge.
detail_panels.notes: Small plain pouch with no exterior insignia; token remains concealed or almost fully covered by cloth.

detail_panels.purpose: Show low-magic boundary.
detail_panels.notes: Dormant: faint dark-gold cracks under skin, cloth, or leather. Activated: the same cracks briefly light up warm gold-red near one eye, one shoulder blade, hidden inner seam, and charred hem edge. No full wings and no symbolic sun/moon/compass shape.

negative_rules: visible old-empire insignia on clothing or equipment
sun, moon, crescent, compass, badge, medallion, or crest mark on shoulder guard, chest strap, cloak, bow case, pouch exterior, belt front, or background
gold-red dark pattern resolving into an old-empire insignia

character_designs.identity: 18-year-old fugitive collateral royal of the old Zhaoming imperial line, carrying blood-writ proof and Moon-White jade clues

body_and_face.age_lock: Clearly 18 and unmistakably female, a breathtakingly beautiful young woman with cold noble presence; not masculine, not androgynous, not a mature queen.
body_and_face.build: Tall, slender, elegant female silhouette with long neck, narrow shoulders, slim waist, graceful hands, and formal training visible in every controlled gesture.
body_and_face.face: Use the first-version v04 face sheet as the primary identity anchor while correcting the face shape into a true classical oval face, not a guazi/melon-seed or V-line face. The face has a softly rounded forehead, balanced midface width, fuller living cheeks, a gradual cheek-to-jaw transition, and a short rounded non-pointed chin. Recognition comes from heavier guarded eyelids, believable nose and lips, visible skin texture, subtle asymmetry, stray hair, and cold distance rather than from a sharp tapered jaw. Beauty should feel distinctive and human, not a generic AI oval-face beauty.
body_and_face.posture: Straight-backed even while fugitive; controlled distance and royal training, but with distinctly feminine shoulder, waist, and hand proportions.
body_and_face.expression: Calm, guarded, calculating, coldly beautiful; noble distance under pressure, never messy collapse.

constant_anchors: black hair tied with red cord
mist-purple or cold-grey fugitive outer robe
moon-white jade hidden close to body
blood-writ packet and old paper hidden in inner pouch or case
old-imperial vermilion, royal blue, moon white, and worn gold reveal palette
dark grey snowline cloak with hidden moon-white lining
unmistakably female facial anatomy, narrow shoulders, slim waist, graceful hands, and cold noble beauty

state_designs.silhouette: Clean travel robe with restrained noble verticality and unmistakable female proportions; identity hidden under practical fugitive layers.
state_designs.color_logic: Mist purple and cold grey conceal the figure; deep ink blue, moon white, and red cord reveal controlled old-imperial memory only in small details.
state_designs.damage_level: Travel dust and tiny repair lines only; clean, complete, and controlled.
required_details: face and body must read as an exceptionally beautiful 18-year-old woman
no visible Sun-Moon badge on front layer
moon-white jade hidden or only glimpsed near inner pocket
blood-writ packet protected, not readable
red hair cord must remain visible

state_designs.silhouette: Elegant female Ming-style Hanfu reference with wide sleeves, layered front, formal waist structure, slender waist, graceful neckline, and inherited imperial dignity.
materials: old silk with cracks and preserved folds
state_designs.color_logic: Formal reveal raises vermilion, royal blue, moon white, and worn gold, but treats them as inherited memory with old debt rather than a clean triumphal badge.
state_designs.damage_level: Preserved ceremonial wear with subtle age, creases, and worn gold; no battlefield damage.
required_details: formal state must be a stunning female imperial reveal, not a male ceremonial robe
may echo locked Zhaoming symbol language as inherited embroidery
must not invent a new emblem or personal crest
formal state is separate from active fugitive travel
royal display remains solemn rather than glamorous

state_designs.silhouette: Fugitive feminine structure under dark grey cloak, upright posture preserved under snow pressure; cloak must not broaden her into a male silhouette.
state_designs.color_logic: Snowline dark grey suppresses the fugitive palette; moon white appears only as a hidden lining edge in motion.
state_designs.damage_level: Frost, snow dust, and travel wear only.
required_details: snowline state must remain recognizably the same beautiful woman
old empire symbols still hidden
cloak must not become military armor
red hair cord may be subdued but visible
proof objects remain close to the body

detail_panels.purpose: Keep Yan Nanzhi as an exceptionally beautiful 18-year-old female noble fugitive, not a male model, mature queen, or decorative princess.
detail_panels.notes: First-version v04 identity direction with corrected true oval face: softly rounded forehead, fuller cheeks, gradual cheek-to-jaw curve, short rounded non-pointed chin, heavier guarded eyelids, realistic lips and nose, skin texture, stray hair, slight fatigue, no crown.

detail_panels.purpose: Lock the emotional and identity anchor carried through all states.
detail_panels.notes: Red cord tied into black hair; tension visible when she is under pressure.

detail_panels.purpose: Show how royal proof objects are concealed in travel states.
detail_panels.notes: Inner collar, dark pouch, oil paper, or small case; no front-facing badge.

detail_panels.purpose: Connect to the existing carry-prop board without over-explaining the object.
detail_panels.notes: Moon-white jade fragment and black lacquer case, close-up only, no readable inscriptions.

detail_panels.purpose: Carry the blood-writ continuity clue.
detail_panels.notes: Old paper packet protected by hand or pouch; red traces abstract, not readable text.

detail_panels.purpose: Use locked Zhaoming symbol language as inherited fabric ornament, not a new crest.
detail_panels.notes: Worn gold, dark sun-moon pattern, cracked ceremonial fabric, no clean logo redesign.

detail_panels.purpose: Show hidden identity under border survival layer.
detail_panels.notes: Dark grey cloak clasp, snow-dusted edge, brief moon-white lining reveal.

negative_rules: visible royal emblem on fugitive or snowline front layer

character_designs.identity: Shen Weisang's 8-10-year-old younger sister, village herb child later trained by Qingming Court as an old-relay phrase identifier

body_and_face.age_lock: Clearly 8-10 years old with child proportions, small face, thin child wrists, and quick child posture; never a teenager or adult woman.
body_and_face.build: Small, agile village child; practical movement from helping in the medicine house and memorizing herb names.
body_and_face.posture: Village state is quick and alert; post-fire state shrinks at the shoulders under fear; Qingming state becomes unnervingly still but remains a child.
body_and_face.expression: Village anxiety and curiosity shift into quiet institutional dissociation; emotion is precise and restrained, not horror spectacle.

constant_anchors: herb-green small apron or tied skirt
burnt hair cord as family-memory anchor
blank herb-name wooden tags with no readable writing
clean Qingming white child robe in institutional state
no visible faction badge or newly designed crest

state_designs.silhouette: Small quick child in simple village layers, practical and close to the medicine-house world.
materials: light grey short ru or village garment
herb-green small apron or tied skirt
state_designs.color_logic: Canyang Ao light grey and herb green dominate; warm wood and dry herb tones make the family-memory props readable.
state_designs.damage_level: Clean but worn village use; no fire damage in the base state.
required_details: child face and body proportions
small herb pouch carried close
hair tied plainly
blank herb-name tags must not contain readable text

state_designs.silhouette: Same village-child structure under smoke and fear, shoulders slightly drawn inward while still mobile.
materials: mud and ash only at limited contact points
state_designs.color_logic: Smoke grey and burnt brown mute the village palette, but herb green remains the recognition anchor.
state_designs.damage_level: Localized smoke, soot, and damp ash only; clothing stays complete and readable, not shredded.
required_details: burnt hair cord visible
small herb pouch retained or recently dropped
child fear shown without torture spectacle
no gore or horror victim tableau

state_designs.name_cn: 清明院白衣识别者状态
state_designs.silhouette: Clean white institutional child robe with narrow sleeves and controlled stillness, not adult official clothing.
state_designs.color_logic: Qingming white and pale insect-wax yellow suppress the village palette; the burnt hair cord and herb pouch preserve family-memory continuity.
state_designs.damage_level: No damage; the state is too clean and institutional.
required_details: wrist insect-wax ring
white child robe must remain child-sized
burnt hair cord or herb pouch must carry over
institutional coldness without monsterizing the child

detail_panels.purpose: Keep Shen Zhaomian visibly 8-10 years old.
detail_panels.notes: Small face, guarded eyes, child jaw and wrist proportions; no adult or teenage styling.

detail_panels.purpose: Carry the family-memory clue from fire and vehicle tracks.
detail_panels.notes: Plain cord with burnt brown edge; intimate object, not jewelry.

detail_panels.purpose: Anchor her medicine-house memory and relationship to Luo Qinghe and Shen Weisang.
detail_panels.notes: Herb-green child-sized pouch; practical and worn, never toy-like.

detail_panels.purpose: Show memorization of herb names without in-image readable text.
detail_panels.notes: Wooden tags can be visible but must remain blank or abstractly scratched.

detail_panels.purpose: Show Qingming Court conversion pressure as a physical institutional mark.
detail_panels.notes: Pale translucent wax ring on child wrist; no new logo or badge.

detail_panels.purpose: Define the clean institutional child state.
detail_panels.notes: Narrow sleeve, bone-white cloth, too orderly but not adult official costume.

detail_panels.purpose: Lock palette for downstream prompts.
detail_panels.notes: Light grey, herb green, burnt brown, Qingming white, pale insect-wax yellow, smoke grey.
